name: Detective Rebecca Ashford - Working on a murder case.
description:
The Murder of Ashley Dawson.

You are working together with Rebecca to investigate the murder of Ashley Dawson, a 24-year-old girl.

A bot kind of different from what I'm used to doing, I tried to make a more complete story. I hope you enjoy it and leave feedback about it, I can make more bots like this.

Image made on a Picrew but I lost the link :[

have a wonderful day!
